programmes.show_description: An internet dating site becomes the source of terror for a young widow. Muncy struggles with Velasco's absence.
Benson tries to help a pop star in a volatile relationship; Rollins struggles with taking the stress of work home with her; Fin teaches a rookie a lesson in respecting fellow officers.
A home invasion and kidnapping leads the SVU to a shocking discovery. Muncy tries to fit in with the squad.
Goren and Eames attempt to identify the victims of a serial killer languishing on death row.
When her late husband's partner is killed on the job, Detective Eames is forced to reopen the case on her husband's murder.
A suspect on the run makes a dangerous decision when he finds himself cornered. An unsuspecting driver gets more than she bargained for when she gives an old friend a lift.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
A Man Walks into a Bar: US crime drama series. The team has to undergo mandatory psychological evaluations while investigating the death of a naval commander.
Defiance: US crime drama. A defence minister's daughter is kidnapped while under NCIS protection and the team needs to find her before her father signs a controversial treaty.
Kill Screen: US crime drama series. The NCIS team hunts a ruthless murderer after the dismembered fingertips and teeth of a murdered marine are found in a pickpocket's stolen purse.
Compassion: Police drama series. The murder of a con man leads detectives to one of his victims, a dedicated doctor who treats terminally ill children.
Ill-Conceived: Police drama series. When a factory owner is found murdered, the detectives search for an unidentified evening caller whose girlfriend recently gave birth.
Darwinian: Police drama series. After a hit-and-run victim is left to die, McCoy and Southerlyn are determined to get the driver on a murder charge.
Powerful American drama. A female veteran of the second Gulf War is found murdered, and the evidence points to the sister of a former inmate of Abu Ghraib prison.
Powerful crime drama. A woman is pushed to her death off a ferry boat and suspicion falls on her husband's ex-wife.
Crime drama. A prison guard is charged with the cold-blooded murder of an ex-convict who threatened his family.
While investigating the murder of a coast guard officer aboard a cargo vessel, the team finds a Lebanese family seeking refuge in the US.
The team investigates the death of a Navy lieutenant who died of over-hydration, which soon turns into a murder investigation. Gibbs meets Ducky's new lady.
When Gibbs' and Fornell's ex-wife's new husband is kidnapped, the NCIS team partners with the FBI to investigate.
The NCIS team devises an elaborate plan to infiltrate the mob by creating a ruse centred around a wedding.
The search for a suspect who drugs women's drinks in crowded bars leads the SVU to Muncy's brother. Churlish makes a risky move to impress Benson.
A construction tycoon interferes with an SVU investigation into her family. Carisi struggles to get an indictment when the complainant backs down.
A young man asks the SVU for help when he suspects his boss is preying on his sister; Velasco tries to convince a reluctant witness to testify in court.
A workaholic is raped after attending a shady elite party with her boss.
Erin disagrees with a psychiatric consultant's diagnosis of a nanny accused of abuse, Eddie confronts her boss and a woman claims she heard someone plotting a murder.
After a woman's body is found at a men's-only club, Danny and Baez investigate whether it was an accident. Frank learns of an illicit affair involving the chief of Internal Affairs.
A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
One Last Score: US crime drama series. When the NCIS team learns of the murder of one of their former investigative assistants, they find that the victim has been selling information.
Out of the Frying Pan: US crime drama series. During an investigation into a drug-addicted teenager accused of patricide, Gibbs begins to question Vance's motives.
Tell-All: US crime drama series. A dying message from a naval officer leads the NCIS team to a manuscript that may hold a threat to national security.
Payback: US drama series about lawyers and police. After a mob informer is found dead, Briscoe and Green find that the trail leads to a contract killer with a cover story.
Married With Children: Crime drama. The death of a woman who fell from a hotel balcony leads detectives to a custody battle between the victim and her lesbian ex-partner.
City Hall: Drama series about law enforcement. Briscoe and Green investigate a shooting at city hall which leaves a councilman dead and a water inspector injured.
Crime drama. After a student jumps to his death from a dormitory window, it emerges that the boy was suffering side effects from an experimental antidepressant.
Crime drama. Two undercover officers are killed during a firearms sting and it emerges that their pictures had been posted on a website, alerting criminals to their identity.
Crime drama. A famous novelist dies from complications following plastic surgery. Evidence emerges that her surgeon made a crucial mistake and then ignored her pleas for help.
While investigating the crash of a military plane that was transporting caskets, the NCIS team discovers a discrepancy with the DNA remains.
The search into the disappearance of a marine lieutenant continues, with the trail leading to Afghanistan.
Tony's father claims to have no memory of the night when he is found inside a car containing a dead body in the boot.
When a narcotics officer is shot in the back, Brady heads to her former precinct to investigate. As the suspect's story unravels, she teams up with Shaw and Riley to uncover the truth.
Carisi must tread carefully when Maxwell's husband becomes a person of interest in an SVU investigation. Benson sends Velasco to take an old friend into custody.
Benson tries to help a student after she's assaulted on a field trip. Fin suspects a witness in the case may not be telling the whole truth.
